creator: ericbsd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The reason I have not updated the NetworkMgr to the latest because it use sudo now and I am not sure it will be acepted to have /usr/local/etc/sudoers.d/networkmgr.

Doas support was remove in the latest changes and I se that your patch does not refect the changes that was done to NetworkMgr.

If someone can confirm that NetworkMgr can install /usr/local/etc/sudoers.d/networkmgr I will update the port.
